markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize editorial direction and review content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Editorial Direction Finalized:** The new high-level, informative tone is approved. Rimkus will review the final 7 articles written in this style to enable full adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
  - [**Strong Performance Confirmed:** Traffic is recovering post-holiday, and articles are ranking in Google's AI Overviews for high-intent keywords (`building condition assessment`), validating the SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [**New BES Content Strategy:** A programmatic series on "Building Codes by State" is proposed to build authority and capture high-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [**Reporting Improvements:** GrowthX will add BES/Forensics tags to the Looker dashboard and provide custom performance reports to support Rimkus's internal presentations.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)

## Topics

### Editorial Direction Finalized

  - [**New Tone:** Approved as high-level, informative, and natural language, focusing on informational intent over deep technical detail.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [**Implementation:** GrowthX's content pipelines are updated. The 7 articles currently in review are the final pieces written in the old style.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [**Review Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [**BES:** 3 articles for Nohora.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [**Forensics:** 2 articles for Jen.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:** To avoid repetitive intros, new articles will vary their opening formats.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)

### Content Performance & Reporting

  - [**Performance:** Traffic is recovering post-holiday, with weekly traffic already matching the previous week's volume.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [**SEO Wins:** Articles are ranking in Google's AI Overviews for key terms, including:](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [`building condition assessment` (top source)](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [`electrical risk assessment` (top source)](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [**Reporting Needs:**](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [**Looker Dashboard:** Add BES/Forensics tags to the "Published" view for easier reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [**Custom Reports:** GrowthX will provide data for Rimkus's weekly internal presentations (e.g., high-level wins, new article links).](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [**Keyword Tracking Discrepancy:**](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
      - [**Issue:** BES keyword performance in Rimkus's Profound tool appears inconsistent compared to Forensics.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
      - [**Cause:** Different keyword sets tracked by Profound vs. GrowthX's Scrunch tool.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Nohora will share her keyword list to align tracking and enable a direct comparison.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

### New Content Strategy: Building Codes by State

  - [**Opportunity:** Keyword research shows high search volume and low competition for state-specific building codes.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
  - [**Goal:** Build topical authority and capture high-intent traffic by providing an accessible alternative to dense government resources.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [**Proposed Format:** A programmatic series (one article per state) with a consistent, templated structure:](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
      - [Code changes for the current year](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
      - [High-level code structure and requirements](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
      - [Governing agency and current edition](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
      - [Specific local elements](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
      - [Typical penalties and enforcement](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Rimkus:**](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
      - [Review the final 5 articles (BES: 3, Forensics: 2) to enable publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [Send Matt a "wishlist" of data needed for weekly internal presentations.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
      - [Share the Profound keyword list with Matt to align tracking in Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
      - [Secure the WordPress API key for GrowthX's publishing automation.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [Add BES/Forensics tags to the Looker dashboard's "Published" view.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [Provide custom weekly performance reports for Rimkus's internal meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
      - [Scope the "Building Codes by State" content series and share a formal proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/tdMGdgaJ92cZ_egE3z_5aQyCQrvRn-ds?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
